creator: xmj@chaot.net
text:
Looks good to me. 
I tried my hand at updating it today and making it stage safe,
and I found that it works with

PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=  yes.

I'd appreciate if you could include this and remove the pkg-plist.

Best regards,

Johannes Meixner
http://www.meixner.or.at

From: edwin@FreeBSD.org
